lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਈ ਰੇ ਅਵਰੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮੈ ਥਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhaaee re avar naahee mai thaau |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, I have no other place to go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਧਨੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਦੀਆ ਬਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mai dhan naam nidhaan hai gur deea bal jaau |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru has given me the Treasure of the Wealth of the Naam; I am a sacrifice to Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਸਾਬਾਸਿ ਤਿਸੁ ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guramat pat saabaas tis tis kai sang milaau |
lines.english: The Guru's Teachings bring honor. Blessed is He-may I meet and be with Him!

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਘੜੀ ਨ ਜੀਵਊ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tis bin gharree na jeevaoo bin naavai mar jaau |
lines.english: Without Him, I cannot live, even for a moment. Without His Name, I die.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੂ ਜਿਨਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਧੁਲਾ ਚੇਲੇ ਨਾਹੀ ਠਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: guroo jinaa kaa andhulaa chele naahee tthaau |
lines.english: Those chaylaas, those devotees, whose spiritual teacher is blind, shall not find their place of rest.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਨਾਉ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਆ ਸੁਆਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin satigur naau na paaeeai bin naavai kiaa suaau |
lines.english: Without the True Guru, the Name is not obtained. Without the Name, what is the use of it all?

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਅੰਧੁਲੇ ਨਾਮੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਟੇਕ ਟਿਕੀ ਘਰਿ ਜਾਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: mai andhule naam na veesarai ttek ttikee ghar jaau |2|
lines.english: I am blind-may I never forget the Naam! Under His Protection, I shall reach my true home. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇ ਗਇਆ ਪਛੁਤਾਵਣਾ ਜਿਉ ਸੁੰਞੈ ਘਰਿ ਕਾਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aae geaa pachhutaavanaa jiau sunyai ghar kaau |3|
lines.english: People come and go, regretting and repenting, like crows in a deserted house. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੇਹੁਰੀ ਜਿਉ ਕਲਰ ਕੀ ਭੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai dukh dehuree jiau kalar kee bheet |
lines.english: Without the Name, the body suffers in pain; it crumbles like a wall of sand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਪੈ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਿਰਬਾਣੀ ਪਦੁ ਨੀਤਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sabad rapai ghar paaeeai nirabaanee pad neet |4|
lines.english: Attuned to the Shabad, we enter our home, and obtain the Eternal State of Nirvaanaa. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਮਹਲੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਨ ਚੀਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: tab lag mehal na paaeeai jab lag saach na cheet |
lines.english: As long as Truth does not enter into the consciousness, the Mansion of the Lord's Presence is not found.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਗੁਰ ਪੂਛਉ ਆਪਣੇ ਗੁਰ ਪੁਛਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau gur poochhau aapane gur puchh kaar kamaau |
lines.english: I ask my Guru for His Advice, and I follow the Guru's Advice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਸਲਾਹੀ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ਹਉਮੈ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabad salaahee man vasai haumai dukh jal jaau |
lines.english: With the Shabads of Praise abiding in the mind, the pain of egotism is burnt away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜੇ ਹੋਇ ਮਿਲਾਵੜਾ ਸਾਚੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਮਿਲਾਉ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sahaje hoe milaavarraa saache saach milaau |5|
lines.english: We are intuitively united with Him, and we meet the Truest of the True. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਤਜਿ ਕਾਮ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਅਹੰਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabad rate se niramale taj kaam krodh ahankaar |
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Shabad are spotless and pure; they renounce sexual desire, anger, selfishness and conceit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਮਨਹੁ ਵਿਸਾਰੀਐ ਸਭ ਜੀਆ ਕਾ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: so kiau manahu visaareeai sabh jeea kaa aadhaar |6|
lines.english: How could we ever forget Him from our minds? He is the Support of all beings. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਸਲਾਹਨਿ ਸਦ ਸਦਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਖਹਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: naam salaahan sad sadaa har raakheh ur dhaar |
lines.english: They sing the Praises of the Naam, forever and ever; they keep the Lord enshrined within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਸੋ ਮਰਿ ਰਹੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਮਰੈ ਨ ਦੂਜੀ ਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marai so mar rahai fir marai na doojee vaar |
lines.english: One who dies in the Shabad is beyond death, and shall never die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੈ ਹੀ ਤੇ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sabadai hee te paaeeai har naame lagai piaar |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, we find Him, and embrace love for the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਜਗੁ ਭੂਲਾ ਫਿਰੈ ਮਰਿ ਜਨਮੈ ਵਾਰੋ ਵਾਰ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: bin sabadai jag bhoolaa firai mar janamai vaaro vaar |7|
lines.english: Without the Shabad, the world is deceived; it dies and is reborn, over and over again. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਸਾਲਾਹੈ ਆਪ ਕਉ ਵਡਹੁ ਵਡੇਰੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabh saalaahai aap kau vaddahu vadderee hoe |
lines.english: All praise themselves, and call themselves the greatest of the great.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਣੀਐ ਹਉਮੈ ਕਰੈ ਨ ਕੋਇ ॥੮॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak sabad pachhaaneeai haumai karai na koe |8|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, one who realizes the Shabad does not act in egotism. ||8||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬਿਨੁ ਆਪੁ ਨ ਚੀਨੀਐ ਕਹੇ ਸੁਣੇ ਕਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur bin aap na cheeneeai kahe sune kiaa hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, one's self cannot be known. By merely speaking and listening, what is accomplished?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਰੀਰਾਗੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: sireeraag mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Siree Raag, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਧਨ ਸੀਗਾਰੀਐ ਜੋਬਨੁ ਬਾਦਿ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bin pir dhan seegaareeai joban baad khuaar |
lines.english: Without her Husband, the soul-bride's youth and ornaments are useless and wretched.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਖੁ ਘਣੋ ਦੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਨਾ ਘਰਿ ਸੇਜ ਭਤਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dookh ghano dohaaganee naa ghar sej bhataar |1|
lines.english: The discarded bride suffers terrible pain; her Husband does not come to the bed of her home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਰੇ ਰਾਮ ਜਪਹੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: man re raam japahu sukh hoe |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on the Lord, and find peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਮਾਣੇ ਸੁਖਿ ਸੇਜੜੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਿਰ ਬਾਦਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa maane sukh sejarree bin pir baad seegaar |
lines.english: She does not enjoy the pleasure of His Bed; without her Husband, her ornaments are absurd.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸੇਵਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur sevaa sukh paaeeai har var sehaj seegaar |
lines.english: Serving the Guru, she finds peace, and her Husband Lord adorns her with intuitive wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਰੰਗੁ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur prem na paaeeai sabad milai rang hoe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Guru, love is not found. United with the Shabad, happiness is found. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜਾਣਿ ਸਿਞਾਣੀਐ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੇਲੀ ਗੁਣ ਚਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh jaan siyaaneeai gur melee gun chaar |2|
lines.english: As Gurmukh, she comes to know Him. Meeting with the Guru, she maintains a virtuous lifestyle. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਮਾਣੇ ਪਿਰ ਸੇਜੜੀ ਗੂੜਾ ਹੇਤੁ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: sach maane pir sejarree goorraa het piaar |
lines.english: Truly, she enjoys the Bed of her Husband, through her deep love and affection.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਿ ਮਿਲਹੁ ਵਰ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਪਿਰਿ ਮੋਹੀ ਰੰਗੁ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sach milahu var kaamanee pir mohee rang laae |
lines.english: Through Truth, meet your Husband Lord, O soul-bride. Enchanted by your Husband, enshrine love for Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਵਿਗਸਿਆ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man tan saach vigasiaa keemat kehan na jaae |
lines.english: Your mind and body shall blossom forth in Truth. The value of this cannot be described.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਜੇ ਮਰੈ ਤਾ ਪਿਰੁ ਰਾਵੈ ਨਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man meh manooaa je marai taa pir raavai naar |
lines.english: If the mind within the mind dies, then the Husband ravishes and enjoys His bride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਹਾਗਣੀ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਾਚੈ ਨਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har var ghar sohaaganee niramal saachai naae |3|
lines.english: The soul-bride finds her Husband Lord in the home of her own being; she is purified by the True Name. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਤੁ ਤਾਗੈ ਰਲਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਗਲਿ ਮੋਤੀਅਨ ਕਾ ਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: eikat taagai ral milai gal moteean kaa haar |
lines.english: They are woven into one texture, like pearls on a necklace around the neck.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤ ਸਭਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sant sabhaa sukh aoopajai guramukh naam adhaar |4|
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, peace wells up; the Gurmukhs take the Support of the Naam. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਰਵਿ ਰਹੈ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਕਾਲੁ ਸੰਤਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad pachhaanai rav rahai naa tis kaal santaae |
lines.english: One who recognizes the Shabad merges into it, and is not afflicted by death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਉਪਜੈ ਖਿਨਿ ਖਪੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਆਵੈ ਖਿਨੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh upajai khin khapai khin aavai khin jaae |
lines.english: In an instant, one is born, and in an instant, one dies. In an instant one comes, and in an instant one goes.
